This female '''[[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]]''' or [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] was present inside the [[Sith Academy (Korriban)|Sith Academy]] on [[Korriban/Legends|Korriban]] between the arrivals of [[Revan/Legends|Revan]] in [[3956 BBY]] and [[Meetra Surik]]'s in [[3951 BBY]]. She left a [[Sith holocron/Legends|Sith holocron]] inside the former [[Uthar Wynn|Academy master's]] room and sealed it with her [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]].

It is rumored that Surik attempted to blast the sealed door with [[thorium charge]]s, which damaged the holocron and made whatever information was stored in it impossible to recover.

==Behind the scenes==
If the player chose Revan to have been a Sith, this person was to have been [[Bastila Shan]]. If the canonical ending for ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' is selected by the player and they have [[Visas Marr]] in their party while searching the Academy, she will notice the presence that had once been there and call her a ''Dark Jedi''.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' {{1stm}}
